top_signals.title: US petrol prices climb back above $4 as Iran war intensifies
top_signals.summary: Resurgent costs drive frustration with President Donald Trump ahead of midterm elections
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tate & Lyle faces shareholder revolt over executive pay
top_signals.summary: London Stock Exchange stalwart Tate & Lyle faces an investor revolt over its chief executive’s salary after failing to address shareholder concerns about its executive-level pay.  The FTSE 250 ingredients firm could be overruled by its investors at its annual general meeting (AGM) on Wednesday after coming under pressure from a leading shareholder advisory firm. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cool Japan Fund faces uncertain future after falling deeper into the red
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Money Market Committee meeting – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.

top_signals.title: Japan Insurers Buy Most Super-Long Bonds in Three Years in June
top_signals.summary: Japanese insurance firms bought the most super-long government bonds in three years last month, adding to signs that demand from a key buyer is stabilizing.

top_signals.title: Commission sends Statements of Objections to several companies and trade associations in suspected construction chemicals cartel
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 20 Jul 2026 The European Commission has informed several manufacturers of construction chemicals active in France, Germany and Spain as well as three national trade associations, of its preliminary view that they have breached EU antitrust rules by colluding to increase prices in the supply of chemicals for cement, concrete and mortar.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Democrats added certain consumer protection rules to CLARITY: Coinbase exec
top_signals.summary: Coinbase vice chair Ryan VanGrack said that Democratic lawmakers had added provisions on customer protection to a digital asset market structure bill under consideration in the US Senate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
